name: living-software-openai-hackathon
description: A governed software-evolution experiment for OpenAI Build Week 2026.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @living-software/studio
scripts.build:automatic: npm run build --workspace @living-software/contracts && npm run build --workspace @living-software/core && npm run build --workspace @living-software/discovery && npm run build --workspace @living-software/observer && npm run build --workspace @living-software/automatic
scripts.build:cli: npm run build:automatic && npm run build --workspace @living-software/collector && npm run build --workspace @living-software/installer && npm run build --workspace @living-software/host-sdk && npm run build --workspace @living-software/cli
scripts.build:packages: npm run build:cli && npm run build --workspace @living-software/intelligence
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run typecheck && npm run test:product && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:automatic: npm run build:automatic && npm run test --workspace @living-software/automatic
scripts.test:product: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
